productDisplayName: Puma Men Neo Low Black Shoes
description: casual shoes for comfort junkies from puma. This shoe ensures maximum freedom to your foot with its flexible outsole and comfortable inner. Wear this pair with jeans or shorts and a bright tee. Upper Padded elasticated upper with stitch detailing Printing on the lateral side of the midfoot Pull loop for ease Upper stitched to the outsole for maximum comfort Outsole Flexible rubber outsole reinforced onto the toe box, mid foot area and collar for comfort Circular lugs on the midfoot with branding Impact line along the foot for shock absorption
